Package net.okocraft.box.api

Interface BoxAPI

public interface BoxAPI
An API of Box.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @NotNull BoxAPI
    api()
    Gets an instance of BoxAPI.
    boolean
    canUseBox(@NotNull Player player)
    Checks if the specified Player can use Box.
    @NotNull NamespacedKey
    createNamespacedKey(@NotNull String value)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    use NamespacedKey(String, String)}, it is not deprecated in Paper API since 1.19

    getBoxAdminCommand()
    Gets the BoxAdminCommand.

    Gets the BoxCommand.

    Gets the BoxPlayerMap.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    no replacement

    getCustomDataContainer()
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    reworked in Box v6.0.0 (in v5, there is no replacement)
    @NotNull EventBus<BoxEvent>
    getEventBus()
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    reworked in Box v6.0.0 (in v5, there is no replacement)
    <T extends BoxFeature>
    @NotNull Optional<T>
    getFeature(@NotNull Class<T> clazz)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    use FeatureProvider.getFeature(Class)}
    @NotNull FeatureProvider
    getFeatureProvider()
    Gets the FeatureProvider.
    @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<BoxFeature>

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    use FeatureProvider.getFeatures()}

    Gets the ItemManager.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    no replacement

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Should use your own Logger.

    Gets the path of the plugin directory.

    Gets the StockManager.

    use BoxScheduler
    @NotNull UserManager

    Gets the UserManager.

    Checks if Box is not available in the specified world name.
    boolean

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    use canUseBox(Player)

    Checks if Box is not available in the specified world.
    static boolean
    isLoaded()
    Checks if BoxAPI is available.

    runtime registration is not supported in v6.0.0

    Reloads box and registered BoxFeatures.
    void
    unregister(@NotNull BoxFeature boxFeature)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    runtime unregistration is not supported in v6.0.0

  • Method Details

    • api

      @NotNull static @NotNull BoxAPI api()
      Gets an instance of BoxAPI.
      Returns:
      an instance of BoxAPI
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if BoxAPI is not loaded

    • isLoaded

      static boolean isLoaded()
      Checks if BoxAPI is available.
      Returns:
      true if BoxAPI is loaded, otherwise false

    • getPluginInstance

      @NotNull @NotNull Plugin getPluginInstance()
      Gets the instance of Box.

      This is intended for operations that require a plugin instance.

      Returns:
      the plugin instance

    • getPluginDirectory

      @NotNull @NotNull Path getPluginDirectory()
      Gets the path of the plugin directory.
      Returns:
      the path of the plugin directory

    • getJar

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull Path getJar()
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      no replacement
      Gets the path of the plugin jar.
      Returns:
      tha path of the plugin jar

    • getLogger

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull Logger getLogger()
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Should use your own Logger. If not, there is BoxLogger, which is marked for internal use.
      Gets the Logger.
      Returns:
      the Logger

    • getConfiguration

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull YamlConfiguration getConfiguration()
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      no replacement
      Gets the YamlConfiguration that loaded from config.yml.
      Returns:
      the YamlConfiguration

    • getUserManager

      @NotNull @NotNull UserManager getUserManager()
      Gets the UserManager.
      Returns:
      the UserManager

    • getItemManager

      @NotNull @NotNull ItemManager getItemManager()
      Gets the ItemManager.
      Returns:
      the ItemManager

    • getStockManager

      @NotNull @NotNull StockManager getStockManager()
      Gets the StockManager.
      Returns:
      the StockManager

    • getBoxPlayerMap

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxPlayerMap getBoxPlayerMap()
      Gets the BoxPlayerMap.
      Returns:
      the BoxPlayerMap

    • getFeatureProvider

      @NotNull @NotNull FeatureProvider getFeatureProvider()
      Gets the FeatureProvider.
      Returns:
      the FeatureProvider

    • getEventBus

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull EventBus<BoxEvent> getEventBus()
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      reworked in Box v6.0.0 (in v5, there is no replacement)
      Gets the EventBus.
      Returns:
      the EventBus

    • getCustomDataContainer

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull CustomDataContainer getCustomDataContainer()
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      reworked in Box v6.0.0 (in v5, there is no replacement)
      Gets the CustomDataContainer.
      Returns:
      the CustomDataContainer

    • getTaskFactory

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.0", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull TaskFactory getTaskFactory()
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      use BoxScheduler
      Gets the TaskFactory.
      Returns:
      the TaskFactory

    • getScheduler

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxScheduler getScheduler()
      Gets the BoxScheduler.
      Returns:
      the BoxScheduler

    • getBoxCommand

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxCommand getBoxCommand()
      Gets the BoxCommand.
      Returns:
      the BoxCommand

    • getBoxAdminCommand

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxAdminCommand getBoxAdminCommand()
      Gets the BoxAdminCommand.
      Returns:
      the BoxAdminCommand

    • getFeatures

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<BoxFeature> getFeatures()
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      use FeatureProvider.getFeatures()}
      Gets registered BoxFeatures.
      Returns:
      registered BoxFeature

    • getFeature

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull <T extends BoxFeature> @NotNull Optional<T> getFeature(@NotNull @NotNull Class<T> clazz)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      use FeatureProvider.getFeature(Class)}
      Gets the registered BoxFeature instance.

      Note: This method returns the first BoxFeature instance with matching class from getFeatures().

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of BoxFeature
      Parameters:
      clazz - the feature class
      Returns:
      if the BoxFeature is registered, returns its instance, otherwise Optional.empty()

    • register

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") void register(@NotNull @NotNull BoxFeature boxFeature)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      runtime registration is not supported in v6.0.0
      Registers the BoxFeature.
      Parameters:
      boxFeature - the BoxFeature to register

    • unregister

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") void unregister(@NotNull @NotNull BoxFeature boxFeature)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      runtime unregistration is not supported in v6.0.0
      Unregisters the BoxFeature.
      Parameters:
      boxFeature - the BoxFeature to unregister

    • reload

      void reload(@NotNull @NotNull CommandSender sender)
      Reloads box and registered BoxFeatures.

      This method reloads some settings of Box (such as language and disabled world) and the BoxFeature in which Reloadable is implemented.

      Parameters:
      sender - the sender who executed reload

    • canUseBox

      boolean canUseBox(@NotNull @NotNull Player player)
      Checks if the specified Player can use Box.
      Parameters:
      player - the Player to check
      Returns:
      true if the Player can use Box, otherwise false

    • isDisabledWorld

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") boolean isDisabledWorld(@NotNull @NotNull Player player)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      use canUseBox(Player)
      Checks if Box is not available in the world where the Player is located.

      Returns false if the player has the box.admin.ignore-disabled-world permission.

      Parameters:
      player - the player to check
      Returns:
      if Box is disabled in the world, returns true, otherwise false

    • isDisabledWorld

      boolean isDisabledWorld(@NotNull @NotNull World world)
      Checks if Box is not available in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      world - the world to check
      Returns:
      if Box is disabled in the specified world, returns true, otherwise false

    • isDisabledWorld

      boolean isDisabledWorld(@NotNull @NotNull String worldName)
      Checks if Box is not available in the specified world name.
      Parameters:
      worldName - the world name to check
      Returns:
      if Box is disabled in the specified world, returns true, otherwise false

    • createNamespacedKey

      @Deprecated(since="5.5.2", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="6.0.0") @NotNull @NotNull NamespacedKey createNamespacedKey(@NotNull @NotNull String value)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      use NamespacedKey(String, String)}, it is not deprecated in Paper API since 1.19
      Creates a NamespacedKey.
      Parameters:
      value - the value of the NamespacedKey
      Returns:
      a new NamespacedKey
